title: ctenitis cerea
intro: Ctenitis cerea, also known as the creeping fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of ctenitis cerea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of ctenitis cerea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
